text.title: Android Keystore and Signing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf names either a concrete rule id or `skip-this-methodology` when the case is out of scope. Max depth = 2.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this an app shipping via Google Play?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: this case is out of scope for this methodology

text.example: Observable: distribution == google_play AND new_keystore_decision == true → conclusion: r1-bound-scope.
